pr.title: Add record: Optimizer Tuning + Sliding Window Eval (val_bpb=1.1864)

output.summary: Retunes muon+Adam hyperparams, trains with 2048-step context, and evaluates via stride-64 sliding windows on the unchanged 9x512 ReLU² model.
techniques: muon optimizer tweaks: warmdown 10k, grad clip 1, beta2 0.99, scalar lr 0.02
train at 2048 tokens with the baseline 9x512 ReLU² layout
stride-64 sliding-window eval scoring last tokens
